item: D6-PUTCALL — Options put/call (DVOL skew) extreme defensive contrarian
claim: high put/call = extreme defensive options positioning = fear -> contrarian LONG, lagged
dataHonesty: Per-delta put/call OI and 25-delta risk-reversal SKEW history is PAID on Deribit (forward-record only). Strongest $0 PROXY = free Deribit BTC DVOL index (2021-03-24..2026-05-31, 1895 aligned days): extreme-high DVOL = traders paying up for downside protection = defensive positioning. Also tested DVOL-RV defensive-premium and DVOL momentum proxies.
rightNull: AR(1)-matched DVOL placebo (BACKLOG-mandated). DVOL is a lagged transform of realized vol (a price transform); phi=0.983 (highly persistent), clusters at drawdown bottoms. Placebo preserves persistence, destroys price-alignment -> isolates options-positioning content from the vol-cluster + BTC-drift trap.

fullGrid.note: winner is a hyper-selected short-on-calm needle (longShare 0.05), NOT the contrarian-LONG belief

gates.deflated_sharpe: KILL p=0.466 @N=1026 (expMaxSh daily 0.0845 ~ 1.61 ann; 1.57 is AT the selection ceiling)
gates.surrogate_AR_placebo: PASS p=0.032 (only the hyper-selected needle; canonical fails)

decomposition.interpretation: The contrarian-LONG-on-fear leg (the actual belief) is flat in-sample (0.058). The full grid's apparent edge came from a short-on-calm leg that is a different (and OOS-fragile, 0.094) hypothesis. Canonical belief inverts OOS (-0.957).

smallFairGrid_contrarianLongOnly.interpretation: Even a small pre-specifiable contrarian-LONG grid fails DSR (p=0.36) AND the AR(1)-matched placebo (p=0.29) AND inverts OOS (-1.23). A persistent random series with DVOL's autocorrelation reproduces the edge 29% of the time -> the signal is persistence x BTC drift, not options-positioning information.

bindingGate: surrogate (AR(1)-matched placebo, p=0.29 on the honest contrarian-long claim) + deflated_sharpe
